svg.text: AI Security Assurance Pipeline — Environment Tooling Highlighted
within a stage: grouped by category, not sequential
Azure Pipelines / Argo / Tekton (CI) • Kafka event bus • DefectDojo (findings sink — wired) • Vault / Key Vault (secrets) • OPA (deploy gates)
SANCTIONED AI INFRASTRUCTURE (anchored on v2.1 Operating Model)
ENTERPRISE SECURITY ENVIRONMENT (Microsoft-aligned) ★ provided environment tooling
Grafana — coverage, MTTR, jailbreak rate, ATLAS heatmap
Superset/Power BI — risk heatmap, portfolio KPIs, compliance
HIPAA / HITRUST control mapping, audit query
